alt: Majestic adult shoebill standing alert with its massive shoe-shaped bill clearly visible
caption: The shoebill is a large, iconic stork-like bird known for its powerful, clog-shaped bill.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated shoebill hero image with verified species identification. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/14/Balaeniceps_rex_%28Schuhschnabel_-_Shoebill%29_-_Weltvogelpark_Walsrode_2011.jpg
